title: Intra-Industry Trade
html:
Intra-Industry Trade

Stub. First mentioned in 2024 10 22 valeria visit (as part of an econ homework prompt).

Two-way trade in the same sector (e.g., country exports cars AND imports cars). Contrast with inter industry trade (one-way trade in a sector).

In China context: industries that conduct intra-industry trade vs inter-industry trade — likely from OSU coursework Yahir was completing remotely during the china chapter.
